transcript.text:
[Today is Tzuyang's travel day]
Hungry
The weather's so nice
[Saryang Island]
[So hungry]
Walking makes me hungry
Saryang Island's natural, fresh seafood
[So good]
[I gotta get this on film]
Hello everyone
I'm here in the port city of Tongyeong
I'm currently at the pier trying to catch a boat to Saryang Island
in order to celebrate Island Day on August 8th
The reason why 8/8 is Island Day is that..
If you tilt the numbers to the side, it also means 'infinite'
They also say that there are infinite resources on islands, hence the 8/8

I ate so much seafood when I went to Yokji Island
It was truly a healing time for me
That's why I'm even more excited
Now I need to get on the boat
[Saryang Bridge ]
[Gyeongnam Province, City of Tongyeong, Saryang Island]
I've arrived!
It's still morning time
I'm going to look around a little and grab some food
The weather's so nice
Godongsan Seaside Hiking Trail
Dandelions
These trees are so tall
A very beautiful mountain with trails
This course is too long
I'm walking back

Yay, beach
The clouds! This view is amazing
[Tzuyang ♡ Subscribers]
[Daehang Beach]
Ta-da
Snacks!
[Tongyeong's Chungmu Kimbap]
They give you squid and radish kimchi here
Convenient to eat
[Eating kimbap in front of the beach...]
[Tongyeong's Honey Bread]
It's coated like this
Red bean paste
It's good Very sweet
I'm at the observatory
Do you see that island over there?

That's Suwu Island, so this is the Suwu Observatory
I'm here to eat lunch because I'm starving
It's a must to come to a sushi restaurant on an island, so I'm here
[Saryang Island Brothers Sushi]
The seafood stuff over there
1 fish sashimi
Abalone, sea cucumber, sea squirt, octopus, whelk, Give me everything
[What did I just hear?]
[Let's start the seafood party]
[Hungry]
How do you not get fat from all that food?
I see you eating ridiculous amounts of food
And not gain any weight
Our island is known for Red Seabream
They're very fresh and famous here I catch them myself
Do you catch them? Yes

[Red Seabream that the owner caught]
It comes out like this?
This is the Red Seabream Thank you
Looks good
Enjoy your meal
Thank you
That's too much food for you
How're you going to eat all of that? It's for all your staff, right?
Your stomach will explode
Bon appetit! Looks tasty
The back meat
This is my favorite! A mix of soybean seasoning paste, red chili paste, sesame oil, and garlic
Ssamjang is the best sauce to go with| (soybean seasoning paste)
That's delicious
Very soft
Tasty

Tender and chewy at the same time
With some sesame oil+salt now
[Soda on the house]
Thank you
Let me pour 1 for you
Thank you
Enjoy your meal
Abalone
This is Sa..Sarya..Sarayng Island's... The name is hard to say
Saryang Island's natural fish
Abalone and sesame oil
Crunchy
Sea squirt
It's cut so that you can hold it like this
In chojang (chili+vinegar) sauce
No bitterness at all

That's amazing
Sea squirt bibimbap (mixed rice) is famous here around Tongyeong
It's very perfectly seasoned Not bitter, but has the right amount of saltiness
Very delicious
Sea cucumber now This goes well with any type of sauce
Even without any sauce Let's try it
Amazing
Very crunchy
Knobbed whelk too!
A lot of people can't eat this because of its bitterness
But you need to try this when you come to this island It's great
Sesame oil
There are whelk seasons
It tastes better than abalone
Amazing
3 pieces of sashimi

This chojang sauce is yummy
Abalone with sesame oil
[Escapes]
It's slippery
There's a hole in the middle so that it's easier to pick up
Well, it's just conveniently there
I came to Saryang Island because the Ministry of the Interior and Safety picks out 5 islands annually for 5 different themes
This is their 2nd year doing this
And I was informed that Saryang Island is 1 of the 5
That's why I'm here
Seafood is extremely fresh on islands
The theme of Sarayang Island is "An island that's great to go for a walk"
Beautiful scenery when walking through the trails
[Where Tzuyang was at previously]
Abalone guts too
It's great

But you need to only eat the fresh ones
Whelk, my favorite
Seafood.. I'm good with chopsticks!
But they're so hard to grab
Yum
The Red Seabream is amazing
Today's best dish
A lot of sea squirt meat
Perfect with chojang
Sea squirt
[Too much Fanta making her go crazy]
The sashimi is so good that I want to keep saving it for later
Because it's so good
I need to eat it at the end
Whelk
[Getting her feast on]

Abalone
It's almost time to eat the sashimi
Knobbed Whelk
It has so many textures
This part is crunchy
This one is tender Some parts of chewy
Very good
[Finished the whelk]
[Finished the sea squirt]
Amazing
[That many?..]
How can fish meat get this tender?
The islands that I've been to are:
Yokji Island, Jeju Island,
There was an island with this grandma that cusses a lot near Incheon
This 1 island near the West Sea

Once at Geoje Island
There's not a single bad memory at an island
It's always been a great experience
I'm almost done eating
The white meat is the belly part
[Mine]
The texture is different Very fatty and delicious
It's so good
I never knew Red Seabream was this tasty
It's savory
Incredible
Aw, no more..
[What is this?]
[Seafood Ramyun Noodles]
Thank you
[She made seafood ramyun on the house for Tzuyang]

Thank you so much There's shrimp too?
There's a whole webfoot octopus in here
Is it possible to slurp this like noodles?
[With octopus legs?]
[What in the world...]
[Don't be surprised]
[I'm scared..]
That was delicious
Amazing
Let's eat all the noodles first
[Escapes]
[Caught]
Seafood makes it so good
Abalone
I love cooked abalone
It's so big

Very delicious
Cooked abalone is the best
It has roe
Let's put it in to cook it
I need to eat that They're huge
Let's get some abalone out
I like abalone
You mean to tell me that you ate all those dishes and you're eating this pot of ramyun after?
Where's all of that going?
[More food on the house]
It's been so long since I had apricots Like since elementary school
Shrimp!
Look at the guts and the roe oozing out It must be filled
Just a little more
It should be ready!
It's fully cooked

Looks good~!
That's big
It's full of flavor
[Round of applause]
Island Day (August 8th) This day was established to commemorate our precious treasure, which has infinite value and potential as a driving force for future national development. [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
